data.title: KuCoin EU launches MiCAR-compliant platform in 29 EEA markets. Regulated crypto access in Europe.
data.description: Vienna, January 29, 2026 - KuCoin EU has announced the introduction of its MiCAR-compliant cryptocurrency platform for users in 29 European Economic Area (EEA) markets. This marks a significant progression in providing regulated access to digital assets in Europe. The platform will be available to users in 29 EEA markets.

data.title: SEI Network's staking guide explains parallelized rewards for token holders as partnerships & DeFi integrations increase ecosystem activity.
data.description: Sei Network has revealed the specifics of its staking rewards program, highlighting a surge in ecosystem activity driven by new validator collaborations and DeFi integrations. The network offers users the chance to earn rewards by participating in staking. The current staking rewards rate stands at X%, attracting a growing number of participants. The partnerships with Y new validators have significantly enhanced the platform's security and decentralization. Additionally, Z new DeFi integrations have been introduced to further enrich the ecosystem, making it a lucrative opportunity for users looking to get involved in staking and decentralized finance.

data.title: BC.GAME updates mobile app with faster navigation and smoother gameplay for players in permitted markets, bringing a cleaner UI and improved user experience.
data.description: In Belize City, Belize, on January 29, 2026, BC.GAME launched a new version of its mobile app, prioritizing speed, clarity, and improving the in-app experience for players in authorized markets. The upgrade includes a revamped interface aimed at enhancing user experience by streamlining navigation and reducing obstacles.

data.title: Sei Network releases 2026 airdrop guide, focuses on continuous onchain engagement over temporary strategies for qualifying.
data.description: Sei Network has recently released an in-depth guide outlining the process for qualifying for crypto airdrops. The playbook highlights the importance of maintaining regular onchain activity rather than focusing on short-term farming strategies. This comprehensive resource aims to assist individuals in maximizing their eligibility for receiving airdropped tokens. For further information, please refer to the source link.

data.title: New Grok Imagine API by xAI offers text-to-video + video editing, outperforming Google's Veo and OpenAI's Sora. (Source: undisclosed)
data.description: xAI has recently introduced the Grok Imagine API, which comes equipped with advanced text-to-video and video editing features. The company boasts that it has achieved impressive benchmark scores surpassing those of Google's Veo and OpenAI's Sora. This new API is set to revolutionize the field with its cutting-edge capabilities, raising the bar for the industry.

data.title: Binance changes Portfolio Margin ratios & Futures leverage tiers on Jan 30, 2026. Traders advised to check position sizes.
data.description: On January 30, 2026, Binance will be making changes to Portfolio Margin collateral ratios and USDⓈ-M perpetual contract leverage tiers. It is important for traders to review their position sizing in order to adapt to these adjustments.

data.title: Binance initiates ZAMA Pre-TGE sale post $118.5M ICO, with 220+ Alpha Points holders eligible for capped 3 BNB purchase. ZAMA token trading 14% lower than ICO price. (Read more)
data.description: Users holding 220 or more Binance Alpha Points are eligible to participate in the ZAMA Prime Sale, where each user is limited to purchasing a maximum of 3 BNB worth of tokens. The token is currently trading at a price 14% lower than its initial coin offering (ICO) price.

data.title: atNorth is building a 30MW metro data center in Stockholm, Sweden connected to its SWE01 site. Customers can now deploy connected clusters across both locations.
data.description: A recent development in the technology industry involves the establishment of a cutting-edge data center that utilizes heat reuse technology. This innovative facility is situated near the company's SWE01 site and will provide customers with the opportunity to deploy interconnected clusters in both locations. The data center is operated by atNorth, a prominent player in the Nordic region known for its high-density colocation services and customizable data center solutions. The news was announced on January 29, 2026, in Stockholm. This initiative demonstrates the company's commitment to advancing sustainable practices in data management.
